meaning: n.头巾,兜帽,车蓬,引擎罩v.用头巾包裹,给...加罩,覆盖
examples: Steam billowed out from under the hood.
The bullets ricocheted off the hood and windshield.
Was Robin Hood a historical figure?
Turn on the lights, pop the hood, open the sunroof -- it's all replicated on the display.
Mrs Hood will preside over the week-long gathering of ministers on the Mound in Edinburgh.
